description: Blix - Marble Run - 1 is an engaging and educational construction toy that challenges kids to build their own marble run tracks. This set includes various components such as tracks, connectors, and marbles, encouraging creativity, problem-solving, and engineering skills. Children can design unique marble runs, experimenting with different layouts and observing the effects of gravity and momentum. Durable and easy to assemble, this set provides hours of fun and learning, making it perfect for young engineers and builders.
